hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold leading-none

layout.assessment_form: min-h-[100dvh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-24 relative

buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-[#0047FF] text-white hover:bg-black transition-colors px-8 py-4 font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.outline: rounded-none border border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide

components.form_options: w-full p-6 text-left border border-black/15 bg-white hover:border-[#0047FF] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0047FF] transition-all text-xl font-medium flex items-center justify-between group
components.cards: rounded-none border border-black/15 bg-white p-6 md:p-8 shadow-sm
components.inputs: rounded-none border border-black/20 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-black focus-visible:ring-offset-0 px-4 py-3 bg-white

motion.page_transition: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.progress_bar: transition-all duration-300 ease-out bg-[#0047FF] h-1 fixed top-0 left-0 z-50

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='option-a', data-testid='submit-assessment', data-testid='admin-login-btn', data-testid='export-csv-btn', data-testid='calendly-embed').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. PWA Setup: Create manifest.json and register a basic service worker in the public directory.
2. Typography: Import Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Do not use Inter for headings.
3. Form Architecture: Use Framer Motion for sliding between the 10+ questions. 1 question per screen (Typeform style). Top progress bar fixed.
4. Scoring Logic: Assign values to A/B/C/D options. Calculate total score at the end and assign Level 1 (10-14) to Level 5 (27-30).
5. Results Page: Use the hero_background asset. Display dynamic result based on level. Show MOCKED Calendly embed and MOCKED VSL video iframe for Levels 3-5.
6. Mock Integrations: Trigger Sonner toasts for 'WhatsApp notification sent' and 'ActiveCampaign tag added' upon form completion.
7. Admin Dashboard: Build a minimalist layout using Shadcn. Include 'Level' dropdown filter, text search (name/email), and a 'Download CSV' button (using Blob API).
8. Components: Use Shadcn Table, Select, Input, Button, but strip out rounded corners (rounded-none) and soft shadows to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
